action.reasoning: Observation: v11 hybrid SPF+reactive still yields only ~19 avg safe_steps (max 63), 0.0 success, found_rate=0, avg_dist fixed at 5.0 (never approaches). Test confirms config (threshold=500 steps in [1,2)m with success_angle=0.2618rad/15deg, max_episode_steps=750). SPF likely ineffective due to missing navmesh (repeated warnings) + dynamic target. Earlier pure reactive v4-v5 reached ~50-100 safe_steps. Analysis: map-based SPF not reliable in this RearrangePddlSocialNavTask-v0 setup without extra config; myopic reactive loses lock on random oracle but can be tuned for better seeking/speed-matching/OA. Root cause: insufficient approach speed, poor OA, no persistent tracking of moving humanoid. Decision: drop SPF, implement clean v12 reactive heuristic (tuned gains k_ang=4.5-6.0, dist-error linear with target=1.5, pure-rotate on |angle|>0.8, depth OA with left/right bias + backup, detector-boosted stable follow at 0.35 vel when visible+in-range, deadzone). Rewrite FULL non-truncated test_full_episode.py + predict.py with HeuristicPolicy class, exact config success_angle, per-ep diagnostics (safe_steps, min_dist, collisions, detector%, streak), make_serializable, full JSON contract. Update train.py to v12. Run test_full_episode.py (5 eps) for validation before submit_eval on predict.py.
